mapper.update: update base_organization_function set state = #{bean.state}, default_account_org_id=#{bean.accountOrgId}, default_settlement_org_id=#{bean.settleOrgId}, default_logistics_org_id=#{bean.logisticsOrgId}, region_code= #{bean.addressDetail.regionCode}, region_name= #{bean.addressDetail.regionName}, province_code = #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceProvCode}, province_name = #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceProvName}, city_code = #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceCityCode}, city_name = #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceCityName}, district_code = #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceDistrictCode}, district_name = #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceDistrictName}, street_code = #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceStreetCode}, street_name = #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceStreetName}, address=#{bean.addressDetail.address}, modified_by = #{bean.modifiedBy}, modified_date=#{bean.modifiedDate} where org_id = #{bean.orgId} and function_type=#{bean.funcType}

update base_organization_function set default_account_org_id=#{bean.accountOrgId}, default_settlement_org_id=#{bean.settleOrgId}, default_logistics_org_id=#{bean.logisticsOrgId}, modified_by = #{bean.modifiedBy}, modified_date=#{bean.modifiedBy} where id = #{bean.id}
mapper.sql: function_type, state, org_id, default_account_org_id, default_settlement_org_id, default_logistics_org_id, region_code, region_name, province_code, province_name, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, street_code, street_name, address, created_by, created_name, created_date
